name: io.github.lubosstrejcek/victron-tcp
title: Victron TCP
description: MCP server for Victron Energy GX devices via Modbus TCP or MQTT — read real-time solar, battery, grid, and inverter data from your local network.

environmentVariables.name: VICTRON_HOST
environmentVariables.description: GX device IP or hostname. Optional — if not set, pass host per tool call or use victron_network_scan to find it.

environmentVariables.name: VICTRON_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Transport protocol: modbus or mqtt (default: modbus)

environmentVariables.name: VICTRON_PORTAL_ID
environmentVariables.description: Venus OS portal ID for MQTT topics
